title: The Flame of the Yukon
writer: Monte M. Katterjohn, Finis Fox, Will M. Ritchey
actors: Seena Owen, Arnold Gray, Matthew Betz
plot: George Fowler, a young man from the states, arrives at the Mias saloon, and the proprietor, "Blak Jack" Hovey, orders a saloon girl, known only as "The Flame," to fleece him. When she learns he doesn't have any money she gets him ...
